testcase.name: shouldCompleteTransferSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: 08:28:40.758 [main] INFO com.cbp.account.application.service.AccountService -- Processing transfer saga: transferId=7ced0808-8c70-423a-bcef-ffe8d23ae322, from=0578f639-65d3-4185-b3f4-bc18f680c94b, to=0c43e942-9253-479a-a4c6-b5b6d2a8429c, amount=100.00 08:28:40.761 [main] INFO com.cbp.account.application.service.AccountService -- Transfer saga completed successfully: transferId=7ced0808-8c70-423a-bcef-ffe8d23ae322

testcase.name: shouldPublishFailedEventWhenSourceNotFound
testcase.system-out: 08:28:40.766 [main] INFO com.cbp.account.application.service.AccountService -- Processing transfer saga: transferId=0b1121e4-12f6-42ee-b251-d65b80a3ae21, from=c40014f6-3d27-4982-bcab-9e101a26d80e, to=d36f1c13-a746-483d-8f9c-4e0aeedba670, amount=100.00 08:28:40.767 [main] WARN com.cbp.account.application.service.AccountService -- Transfer saga failed: transferId=0b1121e4-12f6-42ee-b251-d65b80a3ae21, reason=Source account not found: c40014f6-3d27-4982-bcab-9e101a26d80e

testcase.name: shouldPublishFailedEventOnInsufficientFunds
testcase.system-out: 08:28:40.769 [main] INFO com.cbp.account.application.service.AccountService -- Processing transfer saga: transferId=f2470d82-9683-434c-8170-5650fd6914f8, from=303cd2bf-3eef-4453-b7d0-1ae9b9a06299, to=c64aaf60-b317-4556-8bc4-1e964721ba33, amount=500.00 08:28:40.769 [main] WARN com.cbp.account.application.service.AccountService -- Transfer saga failed: transferId=f2470d82-9683-434c-8170-5650fd6914f8, reason=Insufficient funds. Available: 10.00 USD, Requested: 500.00
